page: Google Cloud Platform tpu7x-standard-4t is an accelerator-optimized server configured with 224 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs and 960.0 GB of system memory. The architecture integrates four dedicated Google tpu7x accelerators designed specifically for machine learning workloads. It features a memory-to-vCPU ratio of approximately 4.29 GB per core, providing a balanced memory footprint for high-throughput computation.

This server type does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached storage options. Additionally, it provides zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The hardware profile is highly dense, trading off local storage availability for massive parallel processing capabilities via the integrated TPUs and high-core-count CPU configuration.

Given the presence of four tpu7x accelerators alongside 224 dedicated vCPUs, this instance is built for large-scale machine learning training, deep learning inference, and complex data science pipelines. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the consolidation of massive compute resources and specialized TPUs into a single node reduces the overhead of managing multi-node clusters for medium-to-large AI workloads.
description: Google Cloud Platform tpu7x-standard-4t is an accelerator-optimized server designed for high-performance machine learning and data science workloads. It features 224 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs, 960.0 GB of system memory, and four integrated Google tpu7x accelerators. With a memory-to-core ratio of 4.29 GB, the system provides substantial memory capacity to support the massive parallel processing capabilities of its dedicated TPUs. This instance does not include local storage, requiring network-attached storage solutions for data persistence, and offers zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The hardware configuration is optimized for deep learning training, large-scale AI inference, and complex mathematical modeling, offering a highly consolidated resource profile that minimizes cluster management overhead for demanding computational tasks.

tagline: An accelerator-optimized server featuring dedicated high-core compute and four integrated TPUs for demanding machine learning and deep learning workloads.

224 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs for high-performance parallel computing.
960.0 GB of system memory providing 4.29 GB per core.
No local storage included, requiring network-attached storage.
Designed for deep learning training, AI inference, and data science.
